OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TOKEN_USER.description: Token user for Cofense ThreatHQ API authentication.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TOKEN_PASSWORD.description: Token password for Cofense ThreatHQ API authentication.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: Date from which data import should start (ISO 8601 datetime or duration, e.g. '2023-10-01' or 'P30D'). Default: 30 days ago.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_LEAKY_BUCKET_RATE.description: Leaky bucket rate per second for API rate limiting.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_LEAKY_BUCKET_CAPACI.description: Leaky bucket capacity for API rate limiting.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_RETRY.description: Maximum number of retry attempts in case of API failure.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_API_BACKOFF.description: Exponential backoff duration between API retries (ISO 8601 duration format).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPACT_TO_EXCLUDE.description: Comma-separated list of report impacts to exclude (e.g., None,Moderate,Major).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_IMPORT_REPORT_PDF.description: Retrieve and attach PDF reports generated by Cofense ThreatHQ.

COFENSE_THREATHQ_TLP_LEVEL.description: TLP marking for exported data (clear, white, green, amber, amber+strict, red).

COFENSE_THREATHQ_PROMOTE_OBSERVABLES_AS_.description: Create indicators based on observables from Cofense ThreatHQ.
